_meta.source: stardust brand identity guide (committed identity — identity-preservation)
_meta.northStar: a quiet, dark, crafted instrument; Ink ground, a single Amber signal, restraint as identity

day._note: Selected app theme — day mode. Deep-ink header band over a light workspace, preview floats as a rounded card on a desk ground. Amber rule on light: bright amber #E8B95E signals (fills/jewels), amber-deep #C9822D speaks (amber-as-text), deep-ink #1A1F38 structures.

selectedCombination.header: deep-ink band (#1A1F38), amber star, light brand text
selectedCombination.preview: floating rounded card (radius 14, margin 12) on desk ground; subheader toolbar inside the card; artifact full-bleed within
selectedCombination.ladder: 2 phases — prototype (platform-agnostic design) · deploy (AEM deploy + rollout)

families.display: SF Pro Display, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif
families.text: SF Pro Text, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif
families.mono: SF Mono, JetBrains Mono, ui-monospace, monospace

motion.reducedMotion: required — static dust, held grounds, instant or crossfade reveals

shell.rule: shell is constant across rungs; only StagePanel content changes

signatures: four-point star built from squares (mark + thinking indicator + empty-state watermark)
faint dust field on Ink grounds (never behind reading copy)
show the seed — SeedChip / provenance md5(brand·date)
mono amber eyebrows — one per surface, role labels not section scaffolding
ink->deep radial-gradient grounds for hero/feature moments
bans: amber as large fill or more than one amber signal per view
